Class EfsRow<E extends IEfsEvent>

java.lang.Object
org.efs.io.EfsRow<E>
Type Parameters:
E - efs event type.
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEfsEvent
public final class EfsRow<E extends IEfsEvent> extends Object implements IEfsEvent
Contains event publish timestamp and row index for a given event.
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final E
    getEvent()
    Returns event stored in EfsFile.
    final Instant
    getPublishTimestamp()
    Returns timestamp when event was published to EfsFile.
    final long
    getRowIndex()
    Returns event index within EfsFile.
    String
    toString()
    Returns text containing row index, publish timestamp, and event.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait
